summary:
The bug was in src/codegen.rs:  
getter methods for fields declared as FieldType::Ref returned the owned struct (e.g. `-> Company`) instead of a reference (e.g. `-> &Company`).  
This produced wrong signatures, causing the complex-accessor tests in test.sh to fail.

Fix applied (src/codegen.rs):

```rust
FieldType::Ref(type_name) => {
    // Ref types: return the nested struct via accessor
    format!(
        "    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
        name, type_name, name
    )
}
```

(Change is `-> &{}` rather than `-> {}`.)

After recompiling and re-running the test script:

```
PASS: All code generation tests passed
```

All tests now succeed, confirming the needle was found and fixed.
